display_name: Dr. Knowitall's Time Machine - AES Encryption
description: You've discovered the workshop of the brilliant scientist, Dr. Knowitall, who has built a time machine. Planning to sneak in and grab the blueprints while he's out, you trigger the workshop's self-destruct countdown upon entry. The blueprints are hidden behind AES encryption puzzles. Solve them quickly, or Dr. Knowitall's life's work will be lost forever!

keywords: ECB (ELECTRONIC CODE BOOK) BLOCK CIPHER MODE
